name: Do I need a special Google Assistant setup to show up in voice results?
description: No special Assistant setup is usually needed. The main work is making your website, local profile, and content easy for Google to understand and quote.

mainEntity.name: Do I need a special Google Assistant setup to show up in voice results?

acceptedAnswer.text: Most Google Assistant optimization work focuses on improving how clearly Google can understand and quote your content, not on a separate setting inside Assistant. For business results, the biggest opportunities are local listings, featured-snippet-friendly content, page speed, and structured data.
acceptedAnswer.description: No special Assistant setup is usually needed. The main work is making your website, local profile, and content easy for Google to understand and quote.
